allow: PowerShell($svc = Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_Service -Filter "Name='postgresql-x64-18'"; "PathName  : " + $svc.PathName; "StartName : " + $svc.StartName; "`n=== Data folder ==="; $paths = @\('C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data', 'D:\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data', 'C:\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data'\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "EXISTS: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 Name, Mode } else { "missing: $p" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\sego_basman_db.dump", "$env:USERPROFILE\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sego_basman_db.dump" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\sego_basman_db.dump", "$env:USERPROFILE\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sego_basman_db.dump"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p"; \(Get-Item $p\) | Format-List FullName, Length, LastWriteTime } else { "not here: $p" } })

PowerShell($pg = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5432 -InformationLevel Quiet; "PostgreSQL 5432 up: $pg"; if \(-not $pg\) { "Mencoba start service..."; try { Start-Service postgresql-x64-18 -ErrorAction Stop; "started" } catch { "GAGAL start \(butuh admin\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('sharp'\); console.log\('typeof sharp:', typeof s\); console.log\('typeof s.default:', typeof s.default\); console.log\('version:', require\('sharp/package.json'\).version\)")
